reason: The market is in a clear Markdown phase, characterized by sustained losses across major altcoins and Bitcoin dipping under a key psychological level with warnings of 'more pain ahead.' Significant negative catalysts include ongoing fraud concerns (ZachXBT, Polymarket), high-profile insider trading allegations (Jane Street, Terraform), and a broader 'AI scare' driving risk-off sentiment. Regulatory and systemic risks are elevated, warranting extreme caution and a monitoring stance.
headlines: Bitcoin's price discovery is moving to Chicago
Polymarket bettors put $3 million on which crypto firm ZachXBT will expose next
Jane Street faces claims of insider trading that sped up Terraform's 2022 collapse
ETH, SOL, XRP extend losses as AI scare trade unsettles risk markets
Bitcoin dips under $63,000 and history says more pain ahead before bottom forms
